main.description: A recurring slot template owned by a venue. The indexer expands this into individual app.hekate.slot records up to a configured horizon (default 90 days). The recurrence record is the source of truth; expanded slots are derived state.

venue.description: AT-URI of the app.hekate.venue this recurrence belongs to. The venue's authoring DID MUST equal this record's authoring DID; mismatched records are rejected by the indexer.

rrule.description: RFC 5545 RRULE string, e.g. 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=TH;BYHOUR=19'. DTSTART is taken from validFrom.

slotDurationMinutes.description: Duration of each generated slot, in minutes. Maximum is one week.

title.description: Optional title applied to the slot template (e.g. 'Tuesday game night'). Slots inherit this for display until an event claims them.

validFrom.description: First moment at which the rule may produce slots. Acts as DTSTART for the RRULE.

validUntil.description: Optional last moment at which the rule may produce slots. Absent means open-ended (capped by indexer horizon).
